messages.content: can you help regarding replying to performance review for software engineering field

Sure, here are some tips for replying to a performance review in the software engineering field:

1. Be open to feedback: First and foremost, it is important to be open to feedback and acknowledge any areas that need improvement. It shows that you value the input of your supervisor or manager and are willing to work on your weaknesses.

2. Highlight your achievements: While addressing areas for improvement, also make sure to highlight your achievements during the performance review period. It can be helpful to quantify your accomplishments with specific examples and metrics where possible.

3. Ask for clarification: If there are any feedback points that seem unclear or you are unsure of how to proceed, don’t be afraid to ask for clarification. It is better to get clarification and avoid any misunderstanding than to make assumptions.

4. Create an action plan: Based on the feedback received, create an action plan with specific goals and steps to take to improve your performance in the areas identified. Share this plan with your supervisor or manager for their input and feedback.

5. Show willingness to learn: Finally, show your willingness to learn and grow as a software engineer. This could include asking for additional training or seeking out new challenges and opportunities to expand your skillset.

here is an answer to a comment about being Competitor. Can you improve this reply    Thanks. What is missing here is example of the work I did between October 2022 and December 2022, I spent three months on porting yocto to anchor and after thatI was not able to complete that because of various 
reasons like lack of resources and lack of knowledge in the team . However I documented everything at the end and accept this is failure/incomplete and even mentioned this to Kyle. However I used the partial results 
of this work for the other works currently (high failure rate for SoM module in Taiwan) and will use the results for S8 project.
How a person is difficult to accept setbacks when such a clear example exists. I really look forward to discuss above example with Engineer Manager (EM) to clarify if this example contradict the values of the company.

Thank you for your comment. I realize that my previous response did not provide a specific example of my work during the October 2022-December 2022 timeframe. During this period, I worked on the porting of yocto to anchor for three months, but unfortunately, due to reasons such as lack of resources and knowledge within the team, I was not able to complete the project. However, I did document everything and shared the results with Kyle, acknowledging that the project was incomplete. Despite this setback, I was able to use the partial results to benefit other ongoing projects, such as the high failure rate of the SoM module in Taiwan. Moving forward, I plan to use the results of this work for the S8 project. I understand the importance of accepting setbacks and failures, and I am open to further discussion with my Engineering Manager to clarify how my example aligns with the company's values.
The below comment received for performance review in software engineering regarding communication. What is the best reply to this
Please share the specific comment related to communication so that I can provide a more tailored response.

Mehrdad’s colleagues can find it difficult to communicate with him at times. There have been multiple times over the past year where we have had to bring a team together for a workshop, such as discussing T7 dock 
requirements with Product colleagues, or to discuss ignition functionality, to ensure that there is clear understanding of a problem. Sometimes Mehrdad does not understand points that have been discussed, or what 
has been asked of him, which results in him not answering the question or taking the conversation down a path that the rest of the group wasn't intending to go down, leading to other team members becoming frustrated. 
Mehrdad needs to really pay attention during conversations, to listen carefully, and to place great importance on ensuring his communication is clear. Mehrdad is an exceptionally talented engineer, but it is important 
that he considers that most people do not have his expertise, and he needs to step back from the technical detail and explain concepts in layman's terms.

Thank you for sharing the comment related to communication. I appreciate the feedback and recognize that there is definitely room for improvement. I understand that effective communication is a crucial aspect of being a successful engineering team member, and I am committed to improving in this area. I plan to take the following steps towards better communication:

1. Active listening: I will focus on actively listening to my colleagues during conversations and ensure that I am fully understanding points that have been discussed or what has been asked of me. This will require me to ask clarifying questions when necessary, and to avoid making assumptions.

2. Clear communication: To avoid taking conversations down a path that the rest of the group was not intending to go down, I plan to ensure that my communication is clear. I understand that most people do not have my level of expertise, so I will attempt to explain technical concepts in simpler terms that can be easily understood by anyone.

3. Improve workshop participation: I will make a conscious effort to participate more fully in workshops and team meetings to ensure that everyone in the group has a clear understanding of the problem and that we're aligned on the same page.

Thank you again for your feedback, and I hope to demonstrate significant improvements in communication moving forward. I am committed to meeting and exceeding the expectations of the team and the company as a whole.

I have received a performance review in field of software engineering for my work in the last year. I have 10 years experience.  the review is good. However I want to put a reply to enable me to ask for promotion or pay rise. Can you modify it to get better reply

Certainly, here's an example of a response that you can tailor to your specific circumstances:

Thank you for the positive feedback in my performance review. I am thrilled to know that I have been meeting, and in some cases, exceeding expectations over the past year. As someone with 10 years of experience, I take great pride in the work that I do and the value that I bring to the company and the team.

I believe that my accomplishments over the past year demonstrate that I am capable of handling more complex and challenging projects. In light of my performance and contributions to the team, I would like to request a promotion or a pay raise that reflects my current level of experience and skillset.

I welcome the opportunity to discuss this further with my supervisor or manager, and to receive feedback on specific areas that I can improve in to further advance my career at the company. Thank you for considering my request and I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Thanks for the comments. appreciate mentioning the work which is done but a lot of other people (Engineer Manager, Principal Engineer, Firmware, Testing, Taiwan team) in the team also invlove in this work and it was a team effort.
If more time allocated for confluence page creation, documentation, Mairmaid learning, prepration for demo provided by EM, this can be achieved. 
When occasionally there are three high priority of major tasks (T7 loosing tag enumeration, L3 raw file corruptions, Taiwan production for  Receiver) is
in progress by me, it is hard to work on documentation and other suggestion here unless a ticket created with higher priority for it.  
Just to add information here, the retriever functionality for L3 (which I was responsible to develop) is  based on real-time object-oriented principles and Linux systemD service architecture for V3 dock. 

 
I can't imagin such achievements can be achieved by someone with such poor performance (as mentioned above) for the company values. I request a review of the final recommendation 
for my performance review after considering the comments I added above. I think that the final rating is not represent the true level of my undresanding for the company values (after factoring the comments I included). 
I was aiming to put request for promotion or pay rise as I discussed the requirments last year with the Product Manager. However with such disappointing rating it is not possible now.

Thank you for sharing additional information about the team effort involved in the project, and for providing more context around the priorities and demands on your time during the performance review period. I appreciate the feedback provided in the performance review, but I respectfully request a review of the final recommendation, taking into account the additional information I have provided.

I agree that the achievements of the project suggest that I am capable of meeting the company’s objectives and aligning with its values, particularly as the project was a team effort. However, I would like to clarify that more time allocated for documentation and preparation could help to improve the quality of this work. Given the high priority nature of the projects I have been working on, it can be challenging to balance documentation and other suggested improvements alongside these high priority tasks. 

In addition, it is also worth noting that I have discussed requirements for promotion or pay rise with the Product Manager last year. However, with the current performance review rating, I appreciate that it may not be possible at this time. Nonetheless, I would like to reiterate my commitment to meeting and exceeding expectations and delivering quality work that aligns with the values of the company.

Thank you for considering my request for a review of the final recommendation and for your ongoing support.

I apologize for the confusion. As an AI language model, I do not have access to any previous conversation or comments related to this topic. Could you please provide me with more information about the comment or feedback that you would like a response to? I would be happy to help.

I have received a performance review in field of software engineering for my work in the last year. I have 10 years experience. the review is good. However I want to put a reply to enable me to ask for promotion or pay rise. Can you modify it to get better reply

Thanks for the comments. appreciate mentioning the work which is done but a lot of other people (Engineer Manager, Principal Engineer, Firmware, Testing, Taiwan team) in the team also invlove in this work and it was a team effort.
If more time allocated for confluence page creation, documentation, Mairmaid learning, prepration for demo provided by EM, this can be achieved. 
When occasionally there are three high priority of major tasks (T7 loosing tag enumeration, L3 raw file corruptions, Taiwan production for  Receiver) is
in progress by me, it is hard to work on documentation and other suggestion here unless a ticket created with higher priority for it.  
Just to add information here, the retriever functionality for L3 (which I was responsible to develop) is  based on real-time object-oriented principles and Linux systemD service architecture for V3 dock. 

 
I can't imagin such achievements can be achieved by someone with such poor performance (as mentioned above) for the company values. I request a review of the final recommendation 
for my performance review after considering the comments I added above. I think that the final rating is not represent the true level of my undresanding for the company values (after factoring the comments I included). 
I was aiming to put request for promotion or pay rise as I discussed the requirments last year with the Product Manager. However with such disappointing rating it is not possible now.

Thank you for sharing your feedback on the performance review and for providing more context around the team effort involved in the project and the demands on your time during the performance review period. 

I understand that while the feedback on my performance was positive, it was mentioned that there are areas for improvement for further success. Despite this, I stand by the value I bring to the company and the team, as well as the potential for my growth within the organization with continuous improvements. While it's great to recognize the contribution made by the team's effort, I would like to stress that my individual contributions were also significant and helped to deliver quality work that met or exceeded expectations.

I acknowledge the need for documentation and other suggested improvements and I believe that if more time were allocated to these tasks, they would be more easily achievable. However, given the high priority nature of the projects that I was working on during the performance review period, it was difficult to balance all aspects of my role. I would like to work with my supervisor or manager to develop a prioritization strategy for my responsibilities, so that I can achieve better results in all areas of my job.

I appreciate your consideration for the review of the final recommendation for my performance review after factoring in the comments I have included. I believe the final rating is not a full and accurate representation of my understanding and embodiment of the company values, as evidenced by my individual contributions and commitment to quality work. Alongside this, I would like to request a review of my expected compensation in line with my experience, skills, and the value I bring to the company. 

Thank you for your attention to this matter and your support in my continued growth and success within the organization.

Would you be able to improve this
Thanks for the comments. appreciate mentioning the work which is done but a lot of other people (Engineer Manager, Principal Engineer, Firmware, Testing, Taiwan team) in the team also invlove in this work and it was a team effort.

Certainly! Here is a suggestion to improve the response:

Thank you for the feedback and recognition of the team effort involved in the work. I am grateful for the support of my colleagues on this project, including the Engineer Manager, Principal Engineer, Firmware, Testing, and Taiwan teams. It is important to acknowledge the contributions of all team members and how they helped to deliver quality work that met or exceeded expectations. 

As an experienced software engineer, I take pride in my individual contributions to the project and believe that my contributions played an important role in the success of the team. My skill set and experience allowed me to make valuable contributions that were crucial to the project's success. However, I also recognize that collaboration and teamwork are essential in any project, and I will continue to work with and support my colleagues to achieve our goals.

Once again, thank you for the feedback and support of the team's efforts. I look forward to continuing to contribute to the team's success and to work collaboratively with my colleagues to achieve our goals.
